name: Valence v2 Knowledge Engine
description: Triple-based knowledge substrate with topology-derived embeddings for personal memory and reasoning
author: Chris McKenzie

tools.name: insert_triples
tools.description: Insert one or more triples (subject-predicate-object) with optional source provenance. Use this to store knowledge claims, facts, or relationships between entities.

source_type.description: Type of source (conversation, observation, inference, user_input, document)

reference.description: Reference to source (URL, file path, session ID)

tools.name: query_triples
tools.description: Query triples by pattern matching. Supports wildcards by omitting subject, predicate, or object filters. Use this to retrieve stored knowledge by structure.

subject.description: Filter by subject value (optional, wildcard if omitted)

predicate.description: Filter by predicate (optional, wildcard if omitted)

object.description: Filter by object value (optional, wildcard if omitted)

tools.name: search
tools.description: Semantic search for nodes similar to a query node using topology-derived embeddings. Use this to find conceptually related knowledge even without exact matches.

query_node.description: Query node value to search from

k.description: Number of nearest neighbors to return

tools.name: neighbors
tools.description: Get k-hop neighborhood of a node - all triples within specified depth. Use this to explore the context and relationships around a concept.

tools.name: sources
tools.description: Get provenance sources for a specific triple. Use this to understand where a piece of knowledge came from and assess its trustworthiness.

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Get current engine statistics (triple count, node count, average weight). Use this to understand the current state and size of the knowledge base.

tools.name: maintain
tools.description: Run maintenance operations: decay weights (reduce importance of old knowledge), evict low-weight triples (clean up noise), and recompute embeddings (update semantic relationships). Use this periodically to keep the knowledge base healthy.

evict_threshold.description: Minimum weight to keep (evict below this)

tools.name: context_for_query
tools.description: Assemble optimal context for a query using working set, budget constraints, and fusion scoring. Returns formatted context ready for LLM consumption. Use this for intelligent context retrieval instead of manual query_triples + search combinations.

tools.name: record_feedback
tools.description: Record feedback about which triples were useful in the context. Boosts weights of useful triples via stigmergy (touch/access) and lets not-useful ones naturally decay. Feeds the inference loop.

session_id.description: Session ID this feedback belongs to

not_useful_triple_ids.description: Triple UUIDs that were not useful (optional)

tools.name: session_start
tools.description: Start a new conversation session with an initial query. Creates a working set that evolves over the session. Use this to initialize session-scoped context tracking.

initial_query.description: Initial query or context for the session

session_id.description: Optional session UUID (generated if not provided)

tools.name: session_end
tools.description: End a conversation session. Archives resolved threads and cleans up session state. Use this when a conversation ends to persist learnings.

tools.name: explore
tools.description: Explore the knowledge graph interactively starting from a node. Uses tiered retrieval with budget constraints for efficient exploration. Use this for guided discovery rather than exhaustive queries.

belief_query.notes: Triple-based query replaces belief documents. Use subject/predicate/object filters instead of text queries.

belief_search.notes: High-level context assembly replaces semantic belief search. Returns formatted context ready for LLM use.

belief_create.notes: Store knowledge as triples instead of belief documents. Map belief content to subject-predicate-object structure.

pattern_list.notes: Graph exploration replaces pattern enumeration. Use tiered retrieval to discover recurring structures.

session_start.notes: Session lifecycle preserved but now uses working sets for context evolution.

session_end.notes: Session lifecycle preserved. Archives resolved threads into triple store.
